---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new innovation or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

One sentence: what do you want seed to do that it doesn't do today?

## Problem it solves

Describe the concrete pain point. What fails, slows down, or becomes impossible without this feature?

## Proposed solution

How should it work? Be as specific as you can — CLI flags, config keys, expected output.

```bash
# Example command or interaction
seed ...
```

## Alternatives considered

What workarounds exist today? Why are they insufficient?

## Scope and complexity

- [ ] Small (single file, <100 lines)
- [ ] Medium (new module, touches 2–4 files)
- [ ] Large (new subsystem, new innovation I0XX entry)

## Does this fit the innovation roadmap?

Check [WHITEPAPER.md](../../WHITEPAPER.md) Section 10 for the current roadmap. If this is a new innovation, suggest an I0XX number:

> Proposed: I0XX — [Name]

## Additional context

Links, prior art, related issues, screenshots.
